response:
# Cheaper Alternatives to Budibase

## **Free/Open-Source Options**

| Tool | Cost | Best For |
|------|------|----------|
| **Appsmith** | Free (self-hosted) | Open-source low-code, similar feature set |
| **NocoDB** | Free (self-hosted) | Database GUI + simple apps |
| **Retool** | $10+/month | Slightly more feature-rich than Budibase |
| **Directus** | Free (self-hosted) | Headless CMS + data management |
| **Supabase** | Free tier available | Backend + frontend builder |

## **Budget-Friendly Paid Options**

- **Bubble** - $29/month (more powerful, more expensive long-term)
- **FlutterFlow** - Free tier + $60/month (mobile-focused)
- **Glide** - $25/month (mobile apps)
- **Softr** | **Stacker** - $20+/month (database-to-app)
- **Airtable** + automations - $20/month (lighter automation)

## **Ultra-Low Cost**

- **Google Forms** → **Apps Script** - Essentially free
- **Microsoft Power Apps** - Included in Microsoft 365
- **Firebase Console** + basic frontend - Free tier generous

## **Key Comparison Points**

- **Self-hosted**: Appsmith, NocoDB (lowest TCO)
- **Cloud cheapest**: Glide, Softr ($20-30/mo)
- **Best free tier**: Supabase, Firebase
- **Enterprise/complex**: Retool, Bubble

**What specific use case?** The best choice depends on your app complexity, hosting preference, and team size.
